---
title: "Post With Grid"
author: "Harlow Malloc"
date: "2026-03-08"
categories: [news, code, analysis]
image: "image.jpg"
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

This is a post with executable code.
border-bottom

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Remove all padding/margins from the card */
  .my-card .card-body {
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  /* First row: no gaps, no margins, no padding */
  .control-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0;          /* zero space between elements */
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
  }

  /* Equal height for all children */
  .control-row > * {
    height: 32px;    /* compact height */
    flex: 1 1 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    border-radius: 0; /* optional: remove rounding for tighter look */
  }

  /* Input: keep minimal padding so text is readable */
  .control-row input.form-control {
    height: 32px;
    padding: 0 0.25rem;  /* minimal readable padding */
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  /* Buttons: remove padding, keep text centered */
  .control-row button.btn {
    padding: 0;
    border-radius: 0;
  }

  /* Output row: minimal height, minimal padding */
  .output-box {
    min-height: 50px;
    padding: 0.25rem;
    margin: 0;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 0;
    background: #f8f8f8;
  }
</style>

<div class="card my-card">
  <div class="card-body">

    <!-- ROW 1: input + 3 buttons, zero spacing -->
    <div class="control-row">
      <input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Input">

      <button class="btn btn-primary w-100">Go</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary w-100">Run</button>
      <button class="btn btn-success w-100">Exec</button>
    </div>

    <!-- ROW 2: output -->
    <div class="output-box">
      Output appears here…
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```



### Best Cards

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Remove card padding to the minimum */
  .my-card .card-body {
    padding: 0.5rem;
  }

  /* First row: equal height, minimal spacing */
  .control-row {
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.25rem;          /* minimal gap */
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem; /* minimal spacing before output */
  }

  /* Equal height for all children */
  .control-row > * {
    height: 36px;          /* reduced height */
    flex: 1 1 0;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  /* Input needs padding preserved */
  .control-row input.form-control {
    height: 36px;
    padding: 0 0.4rem;
  }

  /* Output row: minimal padding, clean box */
  .output-box {
    min-height: 60px;
    padding: 0.4rem;
    border: 1px solid #dee2e6;
    border-radius: 0.25rem;
    background: #fafafa;
  }
</style>

<div class="card my-card">
  <div class="card-body">

    <!-- ROW 1: input + 3 buttons -->
    <div class="control-row">
      <input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Input">

      <button class="btn btn-primary w-100">Go</button>
      <button class="btn btn-secondary w-100">Run</button>
      <button class="btn btn-success w-100">Exec</button>
    </div>

    <!-- ROW 2: output -->
    <div class="output-box">
      Output appears here…
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```
